word_list.pronunciation: hˈʌŋɡɚɹ ɪz ðə bˈɛst fˈaɪnəst sˈɔːs

senses.definition: used to imply that hunger can enhance the flavor of food, making it more enjoyable and satisfying

examples.x: After hiking all day and working up an appetite, the simple meal of beans and rice tasted amazing - truly, hunger is the best sauce.

word_list.word: hunger drives the wolf out of the wood
word_list.pronunciation: hˈʌŋɡɚ dɹˈaɪvz ðə wˈʊlf ˌaʊɾəv ðə wˈʊd

senses.definition: used to imply that necessity can be a powerful motivator, driving individuals to take action they might not otherwise consider

word_list.word: a hungry belly has no ears
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ hˈʌŋɡɹi bˈɛli hɐz nˈoʊ ˈɪɹz

senses.definition: used to imply that when a person is hungry or in need, they are less likely to listen to reason or advice

examples.x: The parent tried to give their child some advice on managing their finances, but the child, who was struggling to pay their bills, didn't seem to listen, showing how a hungry belly has no ears.

word_list.word: a growing youth has a wolf in his belly
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ ɡɹˈoʊɪŋ jˈuːθ hɐz ɐ wˈʊlf ɪn hɪz bˈɛli

senses.definition: used to imply that young people have a strong appetite and need plenty of food and nutrition to support their physical and mental growth and development

word_list.word: a hungry man is an angry man
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ hˈʌŋɡɹi mˈæn ɪz ɐn ˈæŋɡɹi mˈæn

senses.definition: used to imply that hunger can affect a person's mood or behavior and that being hungry for an extended period can lead to frustration and anger

word_list.word: an army marches on its stomach
word_list.pronunciation: ɐn ˈɑːɹmi mˈɑːɹtʃᵻz ˌɑːn ɪts stˈʌmək

senses.definition: used to highlight the essential role of sufficient food and nourishment in enabling soldiers or workers to perform effectively and achieve success

word_list.word: hunger finds no fault with cookery
word_list.pronunciation: hˈʌŋɡɚ fˈaɪndz nˈoʊ fˈɑːlt wɪð kˈʊkɚɹi

senses.definition: used to imply that when a person is very hungry, they will eat whatever food is available, regardless of its quality or taste
